cases.title: Testing-plan §3 Attendance status assignment row maps Present and Late per effective policy windows
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Attendance status assignment block applies (FR-23, BR-11, BR-12, AC-11).
Open class session fixture exists with rotating valid QR token and resolved effective attendance policy.
Two authenticated enrolled students have no successful AttendanceRecord for the session.
Policy defines presentWindowMinutes and lateWindowMinutes relative to session scheduled start.
steps: Resolve effective policy for the open session and record present window end timestamp.
Student A submits check-in with valid qrToken while server check-in timestamp falls within present window.
Student B submits check-in with valid qrToken while server check-in timestamp falls after present window end but before session Closed.
Query AttendanceRecord rows for both students and verify checkInMethod and checkInAt fields.
cases.expected: Student A receives attendanceStatus Present with checkInMethod QR and non-null checkInAt; Student B receives attendanceStatus Late with checkInMethod QR and non-null checkInAt; both outcomes satisfy the testing-plan Attendance status assignment coverage row for FR-23.

cases.title: M05 Attendance Ledger persists Present with checkInMethod QR and checkInAt within present window
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for M04 check-in decision and M05 applyAttendanceOutcome boundary.
Open class session exists with valid qrToken; effective policy presentWindowMinutes=15 from scheduled start.
Authenticated enrolled student has no existing AttendanceRecord for (classSessionId, studentUserId).
Check-in timestamp is configured to fall within present window (e.g. scheduledStart + 5 minutes).
steps: Capture beforeState: no AttendanceRecord row or status Pending for the student-session pair.
Invoke M04 submitCheckIn passing validation stages 1–6 with valid qrToken and check-in time within present window.
Query attendance_records within the same transaction boundary for status, check_in_method, and check_in_at.
Verify M05 applyAttendanceOutcome command was invoked with status Present and method QR.
cases.expected: BR-11 creates AttendanceRecord with attendanceStatus Present, checkInMethod QR, and non-null checkInAt; M04 success decision and M05 ledger write occur atomically per module boundary CONS-02.

cases.title: M05 Attendance Ledger persists Late with checkInMethod QR when check-in occurs after present window
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for M04 check-in decision and M05 applyAttendanceOutcome boundary.
Open class session exists with valid qrToken; effective policy presentWindowMinutes=15 and lateWindowMinutes=15 from scheduled start.
Authenticated enrolled student has no existing success AttendanceRecord for the session.
Check-in timestamp is configured after present window end but before session Closed (e.g. scheduledStart + 20 minutes).
steps: Capture beforeState: student roster row is Pending with no success AttendanceRecord.
Invoke M04 submitCheckIn passing all prior validation guards with check-in time in late window per BR-12.
Query attendance_records for status, check_in_method, and check_in_at.
Verify roster counts increment late count via M05 read path.
cases.expected: BR-12 sets AttendanceRecord status Late with checkInMethod QR and stored checkInAt; no Present status is assigned for this late-window submission; M05 owns final attendance status persistence per module boundary.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord transitions Pending to Present or Late on successful QR check-in
preconditions: Open class session with valid qrToken exists in integration test database.
Authenticated enrolled student has AttendanceRecord in Pending state with no prior success.
Session state is Open per SM-01; effective policy windows are resolved for the session.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status is Pending for the student-session pair.
Submit check-in within present window and record afterState (status, checkInMethod, checkInAt).
Reset fixture or use second student; capture beforeState Pending again.
Submit check-in after present window end within late window and record afterState.
cases.expected: Present-window path: beforeState Pending transitions to afterState Present with checkInMethod QR. Late-window path: beforeState Pending transitions to afterState Late with checkInMethod QR; illegal transitions to Absent or Manual Present do not occur on success path per SM-03.

cases.title: POST /v1/check-ins returns 200 with attendanceStatus Present or Late in success envelope
preconditions: Lecturer has opened session (AC-01); session is Open with valid qrToken.
Authenticated student bearer token belongs to actively enrolled user with no prior success for the session.
Test harness can control or observe check-in timing relative to policy present and late windows.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer token, valid qrToken, and clientTimestamp within present window.
Inspect HTTP status 200, response envelope data.outcome, data.attendanceStatus, data.checkInAt, and meta fields.
Repeat with second enrolled student and clientTimestamp after present window end within late window.
Inspect second response for attendanceStatus Late.
cases.expected: Present-window call returns HTTP 200 with data.outcome Success, data.attendanceStatus Present, and ISO-8601 data.checkInAt. Late-window call returns HTTP 200 with data.outcome Success and data.attendanceStatus Late; error is null in both envelopes per API design §4.4.

cases.title: GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance reflects Present and Late rows with checkInMethod QR after successful check-ins
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with Authorization bearer token.
Open session exists with enrolled students; fixtures support present-window and late-window check-in submissions.
No students have prior successful attendance for the session.
steps: Student A calls POST /v1/check-ins within present window; Student B calls POST /v1/check-ins after present window within late window.
Lecturer calls GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance with Authorization header.
Assert HTTP 200 with data.counts.present and data.counts.late incremented appropriately.
Assert data.rows for student A has attendanceStatus Present, checkInMethod QR, non-null checkInAt, and latestAttemptOutcome Success.
Assert data.rows for student B has attendanceStatus Late, checkInMethod QR, non-null checkInAt, and latestAttemptOutcome Success.
cases.expected: Live roster payload per FR-19 contract exposes FR-23 status assignment: Present and Late rows include checkInMethod QR, checkInAt timestamp, and Success latestAttemptOutcome; counts align with row-level statuses.

cases.title: WF-03 primary workflow assigns Present after auth login and check-in within present window
preconditions: Lecturer opens Scheduled session via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open (AC-01).
Enrolled student completes POST /v1/auth/login gate (FR-15, FR-36) and passes enrollment validation.
Student has no existing successful attendance for the session.
Check-in occurs within present window while session remains Open.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open and obtains rotating qrPayload.
Student calls POST /v1/auth/login and receives Student role accessToken.
Student calls GET /v1/me to confirm studentUserId identity.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken within present window.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for the student row.
cases.expected: WF-03 happy path assigns Present with checkInMethod QR and checkInAt timestamp; roster shows student with attendanceStatus Present and latestAttemptOutcome Success per FR-23 and AC-11.

cases.title: Alternate WF-03 branch assigns Late when student checks in after present window before close
preconditions: Lecturer has opened session (AC-01); present window has elapsed but session is still Open.
Authenticated enrolled student has no successful attendance record.
Session has not been closed (AC-05 close would block new check-ins).
steps: Advance test clock or use fixture with scheduled start such that current time is after presentWindowMinutes but before late window end.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and Authorization header.
Student or lecturer queries session roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Confirm session remains Open and student was not rejected with SessionClosed.
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds with attendanceStatus Late, checkInMethod QR, and checkInAt recorded; session state remains Open until lecturer close; student is not assigned Present for late-window timestamp per BR-12.

cases.title: Present window boundary assigns Present at end inclusive and Late immediately after
preconditions: Open session with deterministic scheduled start and effective policy presentWindowMinutes=15 exists.
Two enrolled students (or sequential attempts with reset) have no prior success for the session.
Test harness supplies check-in timestamps at scheduledStart+15min (last instant of present window) and scheduledStart+15min+1s (first instant of late window).
steps: Submit POST /v1/check-ins for student A with check-in timestamp at present window end boundary.
Submit POST /v1/check-ins for student B with check-in timestamp one second after present window end.
Query AttendanceRecord status and checkInMethod for both students.
Verify CheckInAttempt outcomes are Success for both accepted submissions.
cases.expected: Boundary-at-end submission receives attendanceStatus Present per BR-11; immediately-after-boundary submission receives attendanceStatus Late per BR-12; both persist checkInMethod QR and timestamps without validation-order regression.

cases.title: Non-Student roles denied POST /v1/check-ins and cannot receive Present or Late assignment
preconditions: Open session with valid qrToken exists.
Lecturer and AcademicAdmin users are authenticated with valid bearer tokens.
Enrolled Student bearer token is available as authorized control.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and Authorization header.
AcademicAdmin calls POST /v1/check-ins with the same token context.
Enrolled Student calls POST /v1/check-ins within present window as control.
Query attendance_records for any Present/Late rows created for lecturer or admin user IDs.
cases.expected: Lecturer and AcademicAdmin receive HTTP 403 Forbidden per permission matrix (Submit QR check-in Deny); no Present/Late AttendanceRecord is created for non-student actors; Student control proceeds to FR-23 status assignment.

cases.title: Parallel check-ins for distinct students independently assign Present or Late per policy windows
preconditions: Open session with valid multi-use QR token exists per FR-12 and AC-03.
Multiple enrolled students have no successful AttendanceRecord for the session.
Test harness can issue concurrent POST /v1/check-ins requests with controlled timestamps (some within present window, some in late window).
steps: Submit parallel check-in requests for student A (present window) and student B (late window) using the same valid qrToken.
Await all responses and record HTTP status and data.attendanceStatus per student.
Query attendance_records for both student-session pairs.
Verify unique constraint on (classSessionId, studentUserId) holds with no cross-student corruption.
cases.expected: Concurrent success paths independently assign Present to student A and Late to student B with checkInMethod QR; each student receives exactly one AttendanceRecord; BR-07 duplicate prevention does not block distinct students sharing the same token.

cases.title: CheckInResultScreen displays success-present or success-late with timestamp after QR check-in
preconditions: Student is authenticated on mobile web browser.
Open session QR check-in URL is available; fixtures support present-window and late-window scenarios.
Student has no prior successful attendance for the session.
steps: Navigate to student check-in flow and scan or open valid QR link for an open session.
Complete check-in submission within present window.
Verify CheckInResultScreen renders success-present variant with Present label and displayed check-in time.
Repeat flow in late-window scenario after present window elapses.
Verify CheckInResultScreen renders success-late warning variant with Late label and displayed check-in time.
cases.expected: Present path shows success-present UI state (Điểm danh thành công — Có mặt) with timestamp; Late path shows success-late UI state (Điểm danh thành công — Đi trễ) with timestamp; both outcomes use role=status aria-live region per UI states doc.

cases.title: Lecturer live roster AttendanceStatusCell renders Present success badge and Late warning badge after check-ins
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on lecturer dashboard for an Open session.
Fixtures include at least one student checked in as Present and one as Late via QR method.
Live roster page (PG-06) is reachable without full page reload requirement blocking harness.
steps: Navigate to live roster view for the Open session.
Locate student row with Present status and inspect AttendanceStatusCell (DC-07) badge variant.
Locate student row with Late status and inspect AttendanceStatusCell badge variant.
Verify checkInAt timestamp column displays for both checked-in students.
Confirm Pending students remain in neutral badge state until FR-23 assignment occurs.
cases.expected: Present row renders success semantic badge per status palette; Late row renders warning semantic badge; both show checkInAt; Pending rows use neutral variant until successful check-in assigns Present or Late per FR-23 and FR-19 roster contract.
